prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your baby planning forward
items: Schedule preconception health appointments with your doctor
Research and choose a prenatal vitamin with folic acid
Create a pregnancy-safe home environment by removing toxic products
Track your menstrual cycle and identify your fertile window
Review and update your health insurance coverage for pregnancy and childbirth
Discuss genetic screening options with your healthcare provider
